abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.description: Cannot be target of Charge Action.

abilities.name: Flick of the Wrist
abilities.description: May use Grace instead of Might for Melee/Pugilism.

abilities.name: Manipulative (11)
abilities.description: When enemy targets with Action, TN 11 Willpower or this character changes target to legal choice.

actions: (1) Poisoned Fighting Claws (Pugilism) | AV: 6 (12) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage, gains Poison +1. Gains + to attack. Tome Overwhelm: After damaging, take again vs same target (-1 AV per other Trigger).
(1) Lure (Bewitch) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: 18 | Resist: Wp | Living target moves toward this character. Crow Spider and Fly: After, may make 1 AP Close Combat vs target.
system.notes: Intelligence operatives disguised as humble entertainers. Handlers for Ten Thunders specialists. Poisoned metal claws. Lethal training beneath performance.
